fields.name: Segment No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the segment to which this segment line belongs.

fields.name: Line No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the line number of the contact to whom the segment line applies.

fields.name: Contact No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the contact to which this segment line applies.

fields.name: Campaign No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the campaign for which the segment line has been created.

fields.name: Salesperson Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the salesperson who is responsible for this interaction.

fields.name: Correspondence Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of correspondence for the interaction. NOTE: If you use the Web client, you must not select the Hard Copy option because printing is not possible from the web client.

fields.name: Interaction Template Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the interaction template code of the interaction involving the contact on this segment line.

fields.name: Cost (LCY)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the cost of the interaction with the contact that this segment line applies to.

fields.name: Duration (Min.)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the duration of the interaction with the contact.

fields.name: Attachment No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the number of the attachment linked to the segment line.
The Subject and Attachment fields reflect the values specified in the Segment Interaction Languages window with the same language code as the segment line.

fields.name: Campaign Response
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the interaction created for the segment is the response to a campaign. For example, coupons that are sent as a response to a campaign.

fields.name: Contact Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the contact to which the segment line applies. The program automatically fills in this field when you fill in the Contact No. field on the line.

fields.name: Information Flow
fields.tooltip: Specifies the direction of the interaction, inbound or outbound.

fields.name: Initiated By
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the interaction was initiated by your company or by one of your contacts. The Us option indicates that your company was the initiator; the Them option indicates that a contact was the initiator.

fields.name: Contact Alt. Address Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the contact's alternate address to use for this interaction.

fields.name: Evaluation
fields.tooltip: Specifies the evaluation of the interaction involving the contact in the segment.

fields.name: Campaign Target
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the segment involved in this interaction is the target of a campaign. This is used to measure the response rate of a campaign.

fields.name: Contact Company Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the company for which the contact works. If the contact is a company, this field contains the company's name.

fields.name: Language Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the language that is used when translating specified text on documents to foreign business partner, such as an item description on an order confirmation.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies what the interaction is about.

fields.name: Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date the segment line was created.

fields.name: Time of Interaction
fields.tooltip: Specifies the time when the call to the contact started.

fields.name: Attempt Failed
fields.tooltip: Specifies the attempt failed of the contact to whom the segment line applies.

fields.name: To-do No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the To-do number of the contact to whom the segment line applies.

fields.name: Contact Company No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the contact company number of the contact to whom the segment line applies.

fields.name: Campaign Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the campaign entry number of the contact to whom the segment line applies.

fields.name: Interaction Group Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the interaction group code of the contact to whom the segment line applies.

fields.name: Document Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the document type of the contact to whom the segment line applies.

fields.name: Document No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the document number of the contact to whom the segment line applies.

fields.name: Send Word Doc. As Attmt.
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the Microsoft Word document that is linked to that segment line should be sent as an attachment in the e-mail message.

fields.name: Contact Via
fields.tooltip: Specifies the telephone number you used when calling the contact, or the e-mail address you used when sending an e-mail to the contact.

fields.name: Version No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the version number of the contact to whom the segment line applies.

fields.name: Doc. No. Occurrence
fields.tooltip: Creates the interaction log entry.

fields.name: Subject
fields.tooltip: Specifies the subject of the segment line. The text in the field is used as the subject in e-mails and Word documents.

fields.name: Opportunity No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the opportunity number of the contact to whom the segment line applies.

fields.name: Contact Phone No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the telephone number of the contact to whom the segment line applies. The number will be filled in for you if you choose a contact in the Contact No. field on the line.

fields.name: Contact Mobile Phone No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the mobile telephone number of the contact to whom the segment line applies. The number will be filled in for you if you choose a contact in the Contact No. field on the line.

fields.name: Contact Email
fields.tooltip: Specifies the email address of the contact to whom the segment line applies. The address will be filled in for you if you choose a contact in the Contact No. field on the line.

fields.name: Word Template Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the Word Template code to use for merging.

fields.name: Wizard Step
fields.tooltip: Specifies the wizard step of the contact to whom the segment line applies.

fields.name: Wizard Contact Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the contact that you are interacting with.

fields.name: Opportunity Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the opportunity description of the contact to whom the segment line applies.

fields.name: Campaign Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the campaign that is related to the segment. The description is copied from the campaign card.

fields.name: Interaction Successful
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the interaction was successful for the contact to whom the segment line applies.

fields.name: Dial Contact
fields.tooltip: Specifies the dial contact of the contact to whom the segment line applies.

fields.name: Mail Contact
fields.tooltip: Specifies the mail contact of the contact to whom the segment line applies.
